title: sphaerocionium lyallii
intro: Sphaerocionium lyallii, also known as the New Zealand button fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sphaerocionium lyallii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
